create table activity_logs (
        id bigserial not null,
        action varchar(255) not null,
        created_at timestamp(6) not null,
        details varchar(2000),
        target_id bigint,
        target_name varchar(255),
        target_type varchar(255),
        user_id bigint,
        user_name varchar(255),
        primary key (id)
    )

create table file_permissions (
        id bigserial not null,
        access_level varchar(255) not null check (access_level in ('VIEW','EDIT','MANAGE')),
        created_at timestamp(6) not null,
        file_id bigint not null,
        shared_by_id bigint not null,
        shared_with_id bigint not null,
        primary key (id)
    )

create table files (
        id bigserial not null,
        created_at timestamp(6) not null,
        deleted boolean not null,
        deleted_at timestamp(6),
        extension varchar(255),
        file_path varchar(255) not null,
        file_size bigint not null,
        mime_type varchar(255) not null,
        original_name varchar(255) not null,
        starred boolean not null,
        stored_name varchar(255) not null,
        updated_at timestamp(6),
        folder_id bigint,
        owner_id bigint not null,
        primary key (id)
    )

create table folders (
        id bigserial not null,
        created_at timestamp(6) not null,
        deleted boolean not null,
        name varchar(255) not null,
        updated_at timestamp(6),
        owner_id bigint not null,
        parent_id bigint,
        primary key (id)
    )

create table notifications (
        id bigserial not null,
        created_at timestamp(6) not null,
        is_read boolean not null,
        message varchar(1000) not null,
        reference_id bigint,
        type varchar(255) not null,
        user_id bigint not null,
        primary key (id)
    )

create table request_traces (
        id bigserial not null,
        method varchar(255),
        remote_addr varchar(255),
        request_body TEXT,
        response_body TEXT,
        status integer not null,
        timestamp timestamp(6),
        url varchar(255),
        user_email varchar(255),
        primary key (id)
    )

create table user_settings (
        id bigserial not null,
        email_notifications boolean not null,
        push_notifications boolean not null,
        session_timeout integer not null,
        theme varchar(255) not null,
        user_id bigint not null,
        primary key (id)
    )

create table users (
        id bigserial not null,
        active boolean not null,
        avatar_url varchar(255),
        created_at timestamp(6) not null,
        email varchar(255) not null,
        google_id varchar(255),
        last_login_at timestamp(6),
        name varchar(255) not null,
        password varchar(255),
        provider varchar(255) not null check (provider in ('LOCAL','GOOGLE')),
        role varchar(255) not null check (role in ('ROLE_ADMIN','ROLE_USER')),
        updated_at timestamp(6),
        primary key (id)
    )

SELECT
        TO_CHAR(f.created_at, 'YYYY-MM') as month,
        COUNT(f.id),
        SUM(f.file_size)

        files f 
    WHERE
        f.deleted = false 
    GROUP BY
        month 
    ORDER BY
        month DESC 
    LIMIT
        6

SELECT
        TO_CHAR(f.created_at, 'YYYY-MM') as month,
        COUNT(f.id),
        SUM(f.file_size) 
    FROM
        files f 
    WHERE
        f.deleted = false 
        AND f.owner_id = ? 
    GROUP BY
        month 
    ORDER BY
        month DESC 
    LIMIT
        6
